title: VimFu — :g with :norm
description: Combine :g and :norm to run normal mode keys only on lines matching a pattern.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with TODO markers

steps.say: Global with norm. Run normal mode keys only on matching lines.

steps.comment: --- Demo: type the command, narrate while it's on the cmdline, then commit ---

steps.say: Let's uncomment just the to-do lines by removing the hash.
Colon G slash to-do slash filters to the matching lines. Then norm runs normal mode keys on each one — zero jumps to the start of the line, X deletes the first character.
Only the to-do lines lost their hash. The done line and the function definitions are untouched.
Global with norm. Filter by pattern, then execute keystrokes. Surgical precision.
